case_title: MICHAEL SHEPHERD VS. GO WEI ZHU

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEPHERD, MICHAEL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2021 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $45.00) SERVED SEP-05-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, GO WEI
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHEPHERD, MICHAEL
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
ORDER CONTINUED TO DEC-10-2021 @ 1:30P.M. TO PROVIDE A CANTONESE INTERPRETER.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, GO WEI
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,658.77 FILED BY SHEPHERD, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT ZHU, GO WEI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHEPHERD, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZHU, GO WEI $4,235.25 PRINCIPAL, $95.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,330.25 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: EXHIBITS RECD BY MAIL SUBMITTED BY PLANTIFF
REMARK:PLANTIFF'S AMENDED EXHIBIT LIST RECD IN DROP BOX

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2021 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO DEC-10-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT.506. DEFENDANT GO WEI ZHU MAKES REQUEST TO COURT FOR INTEREPRETER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHEPARD. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT GO WEI ZHU. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: A DATT. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL SHEPARD IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT GO WEI ZHU IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY CERTIFIED CANTONESE COURT INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
